summary: Wire the Liepin worker to the installed OpenCLI runtime, verified daemon, and non-blocking managed-tab lifecycle.
rationale: The production provider must use the offline-installed browser bridge without blocking the event loop during setup. Runtime, daemon, or extension failures remain source-safe Liepin errors, while successful runs retain exact tab ownership and background cleanup.
verification: uv run --group dev ruff check src tests experiments tools
uv run --group dev ty check src tests tools
